title: Web fetch 工作流程：从 URL 到内容提取
title_en: Web Fetch Workflow: From URL to Content Extraction

body.overview: Web fetch 是一种 server tool——你在请求中声明它并提供 URL，Anthropic 服务器自动抓取页面内容并返回给 Claude。Claude 不能自行构造 URL，只能抓取用户明确提供的或从之前搜索/抓取结果中获得的 URL。

components.name: 你的应用
components.role: 发送 API 请求，在 tools 中声明 web_fetch，提供待抓取的 URL

components.name: Claude
components.role: 根据 prompt 决定何时抓取，分析返回的内容，生成回复（可选带引用）

components.name: Anthropic 抓取服务
components.role: 请求目标 URL，获取网页文本或提取 PDF 文本，返回给 Claude

body.flow: 你的应用发送带 web_fetch tool 和 URL 的请求 → Claude 分析 prompt 决定是否需要抓取 → Anthropic 服务器请求目标 URL，获取页面文本（PDF 自动提取文本）→ Claude 分析内容并生成带引用的回复

body_en.overview: Web fetch is a server tool — you declare it in the request and provide URLs, and Anthropic's servers automatically retrieve page content for Claude. Claude cannot construct URLs dynamically; it can only fetch URLs explicitly provided by the user or obtained from prior search/fetch results.

components.name: Your application
components.role: Sends API request with web_fetch declared in tools, provides URLs to fetch

components.name: Claude
components.role: Decides when to fetch based on prompt, analyzes returned content, generates response with optional citations

components.name: Anthropic fetch service
components.role: Requests the target URL, retrieves web page text or extracts PDF text, returns to Claude

body_en.flow: Your app sends request with web_fetch tool and URL → Claude analyzes prompt to decide if fetch is needed → Anthropic servers request target URL, retrieve page text (PDF text auto-extracted) → Claude analyzes content and generates response with citations
